tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesCompilationResultsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new CompilationResult in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesCompilationResultsList
tools.description: Lists CompilationResults in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Repository in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesFetchRemoteBranches
tools.description: Fetches a Repository's remote branches.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesList
tools.description: Lists Repositories in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesReleaseConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new ReleaseConfig in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesReleaseConfigsList
tools.description: Lists ReleaseConfigs in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new WorkflowConfig in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowConfigsList
tools.description: Lists WorkflowConfigs in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowConfigsPatch
tools.description: Updates a single WorkflowConfig.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowInvocationsCancel
tools.description: Requests cancellation of a running WorkflowInvocation.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowInvocationsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new WorkflowInvocation in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowInvocationsList
tools.description: Lists WorkflowInvocations in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkflowInvocationsQuery
tools.description: Returns WorkflowInvocationActions in a given WorkflowInvocation.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesCommit
tools.description: Applies a Git commit for uncommitted files in a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Workspace in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a single Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesFetchFileDiff
tools.description: Fetches Git diff for an uncommitted file in a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesFetchFileGitStatuses
tools.description: Fetches Git statuses for the files in a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesFetchGitAheadBehind
tools.description: Fetches Git ahead/behind against a remote branch.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesGet
tools.description: Fetches a single Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesInstallNpmPackages
tools.description: Installs dependency NPM packages (inside a Workspace).

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesList
tools.description: Lists Workspaces in a given Repository.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesMakeDirectory
tools.description: Creates a directory inside a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesMoveDirectory
tools.description: Moves a directory (inside a Workspace), and all of its contents, to a new location.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesMoveFile
tools.description: Moves a file (inside a Workspace) to a new location.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesPull
tools.description: Pulls Git commits from the Repository's remote into a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesPush
tools.description: Pushes Git commits from a Workspace to the Repository's remote.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesQueryDirectoryContents
tools.description: Returns the contents of a given Workspace directory.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesReadFile
tools.description: Returns the contents of a file (inside a Workspace).

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesRemoveDirectory
tools.description: Deletes a directory (inside a Workspace) and all of its contents.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesRemoveFile
tools.description: Deletes a file (inside a Workspace).

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesReset
tools.description: Performs a Git reset for uncommitted files in a Workspace.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.dataformProjectsLocationsRepositoriesWorkspacesWriteFile
tools.description: Writes to a file (inside a Workspace).

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
